mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, level, is_active, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM notices WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY CASE WHEN level = 'URGENT' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT id, title, content, level, is_active, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM notices ORDER BY CASE WHEN level = 'URGENT' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notices (title, content, level, is_active, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{level}, 'NORMAL'), COALESCE(#{isActive}, TRUE), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE notices SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, level = COALESCE(#{level}, level), is_active = COALESCE(#{isActive}, is_active), sort_order = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, sort_order), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
